rows.label: qev060202_MSG0001
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0002
rows.name: ………………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0003
rows.name: ...Mumble... mumble...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0004
rows.name:
*Snore*... ...I am...
sleeping... Mumble... mumble...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0010
rows.name: Wake Him[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0011
rows.name: Wake up Hoskeran, who is sleeping inside the trailer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0020
rows.name: Let Him Sleep[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0021
rows.name: Do not disturb Hoskeran's slumber.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0005
rows.name:
...Hm? Hmm? I feel like I was
just explaining my sleeping
state to someone just now...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0006
rows.name:
Was that a dream...? That was my
first time seeing one... It makes
me feel quite Earthling-like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0007
rows.name:
...Mumble... mumble... ...I will...
continue sleeping... *Snore*...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0008
rows.name:
...And what are you doing
in a place like this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0009
rows.name:
Vigil Paguruses appear frequently around
here, so I think it's dangerous to just
space out. Look, take a glance to your left.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0010
rows.name:
Are you going to fight them now?
Please do your best. I will secretly
cheer you on from inside the car.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0011
rows.name:
That was a rather magnificent
battle. Watching you completely
blew away my sleepiness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0012
rows.name:
...So, what are you doing in a place like
this? Were you beating up native creatures
to vent some irrepressible violent urges?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0030
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0031
rows.name: Answer that he is exactly right.

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0041
rows.name: Inform Hoskeran that you came to help him.

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0013
rows.name:
May Golbogga's mercy be upon the
Vigil Paguruses that fell victim to
your terrifying violent urges...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0014
rows.name:
...So, what is it? The fact
that you are still here means...
Am I your next target?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Eh? Horonalderon asked
you to come help me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0016
rows.name:
I attempted that thing Earthlings
call "deadpan humor". It saddens
me that you did not play along.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0017
rows.name:
So... what is it? Horonalderon
asked you to come help me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0018
rows.name:
Ah... Come to think of it, I was told to report
back with details... But I thought it didn't
really matter, so I haven't been doing it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0019
rows.name:
...What was I doing here, you ask? I managed
to obtain some rather intense Voltant, so
I was just taking a little break.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0020
rows.name:
Well... if you're going to rush me like
that, I will depart right away. Goodness,
Horonalderon is such a worrywart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0021
rows.name:
Oh! You're the person from the
Primordial Wilderness, aren't you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0022
rows.name:
Recently, I learned about this thing Earthlings
do called a "metaphor". Would you mind listening
to what I have to say for a bit?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0050
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0051
rows.name: Listen to Hoskeran's metaphor.

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0061
rows.name: Decline, saying you are busy right now.

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0023
rows.name:
Oh! Excellent! Horonalderon was
panicking about something and wouldn't
listen to a single word I said.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0024
rows.name:
I see. I understand your viewpoint. Now
then, please listen to my "metaphor".[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0025
rows.name:
You see, let's suppose an Earthling wearing
a black mask jumped out in front of the
trailer I was driving, for example.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0026
rows.name:
Let's suppose that Earthling told me they
were going to use the Voltant we Zaruboggan
have gathered to completely wreck NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0027
rows.name:
And then, let's suppose that dangerous
Earthling stole the entire trailer...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0028
rows.name:
Which contained Voltant so potent that an Earthling
would pass out just from taking a sniff of it,
for example... Is that actually a problem?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0070
rows.name: Confirm

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0071
rows.name: Nod and say it is a problem.

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0080
rows.name: Correct

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0081
rows.name: Strictly point out that that isn't a metaphor.

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0029
rows.name:
I see! So it is a problem after all!
However, I possess no problem-solving
skills, so there's nothing I can do about it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0030
rows.name:
Yes... This concludes my story. Wait,
was that not a "metaphor"? Earthling
conversation is quite difficult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0031
rows.name:
Explaining the situation that just
occurred to me isn't called a "metaphor"?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0032
rows.name:
I see... That's difficult.
Well, this concludes my story.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0033
rows.name:
Wait just a minute!! Th-That's
a huge problem, isn't it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0034
rows.name:
Yes... If, for example, that Voltant was scattered
and a tragedy occurred where the people of this city
died in massive numbers, that would be terrible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0035
rows.name:
...Oh! Wasn't that exactly
a metaphor just now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0090
rows.name: Endure

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0091
rows.name: Patiently continue talking with Hoskeran.

rows.label: qev060202_JNK0100
rows.name: Ignore

rows.label: qev060202_SEL0101
rows.name: Give up on Hoskeran and speak with Horonalderon instead.

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0036
rows.name:
Unfortunately, I possess no
skills to resolve this problem.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0037
rows.name:
If you view this matter as a
problem, why don't you start
by gathering information?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0038
rows.name:
For example, a BLADE named Piers is
quite close to the Zaruboggan, so he
might be able to give you some clues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0039
rows.name:
Heheh... I am gradually mastering
the "metaphor". My own talent
is quite terrifying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0040
rows.name: [ST:playername ]... I truly respect you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0041
rows.name:
Even among the Zaruboggan, there
are not many who can handle
dealing with him properly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0042
rows.name:
...I'm sorry. He is always like
this... It's only natural that
you would be exasperated.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0043
rows.name:
You are right... I will gather
my comrades and try searching
for the culprit as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0044
rows.name:
Oh, you seem quite motivated, don't you?
In that case, why don't you try asking
a BLADE named Piers for information?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0045
rows.name:
He is quite close to the Zaruboggan, so
he might be able to give you some clues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0046
rows.name:
Heheh... Well, for example, if the stolen Voltant
has already been scattered at this very moment,
such an investigation would be pointless, though.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0047
rows.name: …………[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0048
rows.name:
...I'm sorry. I will be sure to
repay this favor without fail.
Please, help us resolve this incident![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0049
rows.name:
That person taught me a very fascinating
conversational method. Ahhh... I want
to use metaphors more and more![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0050
rows.name:
*Yaaawn*... I'm getting kind of
sleepy. Metaphorically speaking,
I'm as sleepy as a sleepy cat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060202_MSG0051
rows.name:
Horonalderon is being noisy
about something too, so maybe
I'll just disappear somewhere.[ST:wait ]
